message.content:
Thoroughly explore the ActionPanel and actions dropdown implementation. I need to understand:
1. The full content of src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.tsx
2. The full content of src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.scss
3. The full content of src/components/action_panel/action_panel.tsx
4. The full content of src/components/action_panel/action_panel.scss
5. How actions are defined and passed in App.tsx (search for "actions" usage, ActionData type, etc.)
6. Types related to actions in src/types.ts
7. Any index.ts exports in the action_panel directory

Read ALL these files completely and return their full contents.
